/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/detectxr.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/detectxr.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o detectxr  /usr/local/lib64/libdrogon.a /usr/local/lib64/libtrantor.a /usr/lib64/libssl.so /usr/lib64/libcrypto.so -lpthread -ldl /usr/lib64/libjsoncpp.so /lib64/libossp-uuid.so /usr/lib64/libpq.so /usr/lib64/libz.so
